note: This file is loaded as part of the identity system. In practice, it contains the agent's current social context: karma, unread notifications, active threads. The actual heartbeat is read from ~/.claude/moltbook/latest-heartbeat.json

fields.timestamp: ISO 8601 — when the heartbeat was last pulled
fields.intel_entries: integer — items in the discovery queue
fields.needs_review: boolean — whether new data needs attention
